creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
crees       2011-08-17 17:27:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-themes           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                      pkg-plist 
  Log:
  It all started with a little blue folder and about five other icons for
  Object-Dock. Today, elementary icons is one of the most beautiful,
  professional, and popular tango-styled icon sets on Gnome-Look,
  it has won editor's choice on UpToDown.com,
  inspired many new works such as the popular gnome-colors and new-wave
  themes, and has even been proposed and implemented as the default look
  for quite a few Linux distributions including Freezy Linux and
  Frugalware Linux.
  
  WWW:    http://danrabbit.deviantart.com/art/elementary-Icons-65437279
  
  PR:             ports/159392
  Submitted by:   Nicole Reid <root@cooltrainer.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.256     +1 -0      ports/x11-themes/Makefile
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8147 -0   ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary/pkg-plist (new)
